name: Mehraj Alom Tapadar
tagline: AI/ML Developer working on Multimodal AI, Computer Vision, Agentic AI and RAG Systems.
about: I build computer vision pipelines and agentic AI workflows from research to deployment. My work includes deep learning, FastAPI, LangGraph, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, multimodal AI systems, and healthcare AI applications. I enjoy building production-ready AI products that solve real-world problems while continuously exploring modern AI technologies.
opensource: I actively build open-source AI projects covering computer vision, generative AI, agentic systems, and backend development. I regularly publish code on GitHub and experiment with datasets and models on Kaggle.
